description.from: Attacks a random enemy and its nearby enemies 3 times, dealing a total of ??? M.DMG and inflicting Stun for 3 sec.
description.to: Deals 333*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+153.2% ATK Magic DMG 3 time to a random enemy and nearby enemies, and stuns them for 1.8sec.

description.from: Creates a Seed of Belladonna around the target for 10 sec. The seed deals ??? M.DMG to nearby enemies every 2 sec, increasing M.DMG the target takes by 30% and reducing Heal Rate by 30% for 5 sec.
description.to:
Creates [Belladonna Seed] in the area around the target for 7sec.

[Belladonna Seed]: Deals 403*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+146.2% ATK Magic DMG to nearby enemies every 1sec and reduces Healing Rate by 25% for 1sec.

description.from: Attacks enemies within a wide frontal range of self 6 times, dealing a total of ??? M.DMG and knocking them down for 3 sec.
description.to: Deals 304*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+112.2% ATK Magic DMG 6 time to enemies in a wide frontal area and knocks them down for 1sec.

description.from: Normal and Skill attacks inflicts Poison on a target, dealing a total of ??? continuous M.DMG and reducing Heal Rate by 5% over 20 sec. Poison can be stacked up to max 5 times. If Lorraine dies, Poison effect on enemies will disappear.
description.to: On Normal and Skill Attacks, inflicts [Poison] on the target, dealing Magic DoT equal to 100% ATK every 1sec for 20sec and reducing Healing Rate by 1%. This effect stacks up to 25 times.

dark.from: Recovers own Mana by 250 upon a Critical Hit.
dark.to: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but damage dealt is increased by 100%.

dark.from: The duration of the CC on hit enemies increases by 30% for 5 sec.
dark.to: Enemies hit suffer increased status ailment duration by 20% for 5 sec.

light.from: Mana cost is increased by 1 but DMG is boosted by 100%.
light.to: Mana cost increases by 1000, but damage increases by 100%.

dark.from: Increases Mana Cost by 1 and dispels positive effects of enemies within range.
dark.to: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but removes beneficial effects from enemies within range.

light.from: Reduces the target's ATK by 5% per stack of Poison.
light.to: For each [Poison] stack, the target's Attack is reduced by 1%.

dark.from: If the target is a boss, increases DMG of Poison by x3.
dark.to: If the target is a boss, [Poison] damage increases by 100%.

description.from: [Thornbush Forest] Increases DMG by 50% and reduces Cooldown by {0}.
description.to: [Thornbush Forest] Increases DMG by 50% and reduces Cooldown by {0} sec.

description.from: [Seed of Belladonna] Reduces Mana Cost by 1, Mana of hit enemies by {0}, and recovers own Mana by {1}.
description.to: [Seed of Belladonna] Reduces Mana Cost by 1, Mana of hit enemies by {0}, and recovers own Mana by {2}.

description.from: [Wrath of the Forest] DMG is increased by {0}%. Upon Crit Hit on enemies with over 5 stacks of Poison, skill cooldown is reduced by 4%.
description.to: [Wrath of the Forest] Increases DMG by {0}%. Upon a Crit Hit on enemies with 5 or more stacks of Poison, reduces Cooldown by 4%.

description.from: [Poison] Poison effect becomes irremovable and for the duration of Poison, target takes {0}% increased M.DMG
description.to: [Poison] makes Poison effect irremovable and increases DMG dealt to Bosses by {0}%.

dark.from: At the beginning of each battle, immediately reduces all Skill Cooldown of self by 30% and increases DMG dealt to Non-Hero enemies by 20% for 90 sec. DMG Boost effect stacks up to max 5 times and is irremovable.
dark.to: At the start of battle, all skill cooldowns are reduced by 30%, and damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by 10% for 90 sec. The damage increase stacks up to 5 times and cannot be dispelled.

description.from: Deals M.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK to enemies inflicted with Poison every 7 secm reducing M.DEF by {1}% and increasing M.DMG the target takes by {2}% for 10 sec.
description.to: Every 7 sec, deals Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power to poisoned enemies, reduces their Magic Defense by {1}% for 10 sec, and increases their Magic Damage taken by {2}%.

description.from: Summons the soul of World Tree's Will, Roburu for 10 sec, dealing ??? DMG on a random enemy every 2 sec, increasing M.DMG it takes by 30% for 10 sec and inflicting Shackle for 2 sec. Also recovers own Mana by 500 and reduces Cooldown of all Skills by 1 sec every 2 sec.
description.to: Summons the soul of World Tree’s Will, Roburu for 10sec, dealing 300% of ATK M.DMG to a random enemy every 2sec, increasing M.DMG taken by 30% for 10sec, and inflicting Shackle for 2sec. Also recovers 500 Mana every 2sec.

1.from: Increases own ATK by 50% for the duration of soul.
1.to: Increases own ATK by 45% for the duration of soul.

2.from: Increases the duration of CC effects applied upon enemies by 30% and reduces thier M.DEF by 25% for the duration of soul.
2.to: For the duration of the soul, increases the duration of CC effects taken by all enemies by 30%.
